trends.headline: Making a Claude usage display with Clawdmeter
trends.summary: Clawdmeter is an ESP32-S3-powered desk dashboard that monitors Claude Code token usage and displays it on a 2.16″ AMOLED screen. trends.headline: Visualize UART and I2C protocols in 3D

trends.headline: CERN open-sources its entire KiCad component library
trends.summary: On May 7, 2026, the European Organization for Nuclear Research (CERN) released its KiCad component library, which had been used internally, under an open-source CERN Open Hardware Licence Version 2 – Permissive license.
